nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: r-(s-HIV-1 Oligopeptide-5 rh-Oligopeptide-98 Tetrapeptide-89 rh-Oligopeptide-108 rh-Oligopeptide-100 Tripeptide-89 rh-Oligopeptide-101)
chemicalDescription: r-(s-HIV-1 Oligopeptide-5 rh-Oligopeptide-98 Tetrapeptide-89 rh-Oligopeptide-108 rh-Oligopeptide-100 Tripeptide-89 rh-Oligopeptide-101) a single chain fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes encoding for s-HIV-1 Oligopeptide-5 SP, rh-Oligopeptide-98, Tetrapeptide-89, rh-Oligopeptide-108, rh-Oligopeptide-100, Tripeptide-89 and rh-Oligopeptide-101. The fusion peptide contains 252 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
inciName: R-(S-HIV-1 OLIGOPEPTIDE-5 RH-OLIGOPEPTIDE-98 TETRAPEPTIDE-89 RH-OLIGOPEPTIDE-108 RH-OLIGOPEPTIDE-100 TRIPEPTIDE-89 RH-OLIGOPEPTIDE-101)
